Cooper Flagg Confirmed Available for Mavericks vs. Raptors Playoff Game | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Dallas Mavericks rookie **Cooper Flagg** is officially cleared to play against the **Toronto Raptors**, announced by head coach Jason Kidd as a game-time decision that resolved positively; he will be on a **20-25 minute restriction** due to the compressed playoff schedule[1].
